EMAIL TRIAGE & DRAFTING

![Lindy logo face](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c11a60ce707ffd38c15069_logo-face.avif)

### I organize your inbox, and draft your replies.

I label every email, and draft replies in your voice. Just review, edit if needed, and hit send.

I'll text you about important emails so you never miss what matters.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/6a15935734cfc5cca01f1234_email-triage-desktop.avif)

MEETING SCHEDULING

![Lindy logo face](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c11a60ce707ffd38c15069_logo-face.avif)

### I schedule your meetings, and manage your calendar.

I find a time that works, send the invite, and reschedule when plans change. No more back-and-forth.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/6a159355c6ea457ac1417e9f_meetings-sch-desktop.avif)

MEETING PREP & RECORDING

![Lindy logo face](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c11a60ce707ffd38c15069_logo-face.avif)

### I brief you before every call, and follow up after.

I brief you before the call, take notes during, and send the recap and action items after.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/6a159355472ea5097ef46378_meeting-prep-desktop.avif)

REMINDERS & ACTION ITEMS

![Lindy logo face](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c11a60ce707ffd38c15069_logo-face.avif)

### I track your to-dos, and handle your follow-ups.

I pull action items from your emails and meetings, remind you what’s due, and keep you on track so nothing slips through the cracks.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/6a159355c5f2f961a96af349_reminders-desktop.avif)

![Lindy logo face](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/698a24c8334710930dc1a4ba_logo-face.avif)

## See how I eliminate workday chaos

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/699c412daa8ab3549fc6ef00_flo.jpg)

Watch: See Lindy in action

HOW IT WORKS

## Get started in seconds

## Lindy drafts your email, preps your meetings, and handles the busywork before you even wake up.

### **Connect your email**

Link Gmail or Outlook. Lindy starts organizing in under 60 seconds.

### I learn your style

The more you use it, the better it gets. Drafts, scheduling, priorities — all tuned to you.

### Start getting time back

Inbox managed. Meetings handled. Two hours back every day.

INTEGRATIONS

## I connect with all your favorite apps.

With hundreds of integrations, Lindy can read your Slack, cross-reference your calendar, and draft a response in Gmail, all without you asking.

[See all integrations](https://www.lindy.ai/integrations) See all integrations

See all integrations

Security by design

## I'm personalized AI, with enterprise-grade security.

Lindy is built privacy-first. That means you control your data and encryption comes standard. Approvals are built in, and your data is never sold or used to train models.

![Logo of GPDR](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/6989b4981913ef45a77890e5_email_trigger_eyebrow_icon.avif)

![Logo of HIPAA](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/6989b498f8ded21285c4f764_email_trigger_eyebrow_icon-1.avif)
